what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment: an image asset linked to the design-assets channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
conventions: Id-based filename matching the id field
URI target referencing a channel-local asset path
concerns: Target filename contains spaces and parentheses, which may be fragile in URLs/paths
No descriptive caption, title, or MIME type
Resolvability of the image:// URI scheme is not defined here
notes: A bare ledger entry that registers an image asset attachment under the design-assets channel.
questions: What image format is the target file?
Who added this attachment and why?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment metadata record matches the content: it records an image attachment for a channel.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a minimal, machine-readable record that associates a specific image file with a channel so the asset can be tracked and retrieved.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to address a channel-local asset, and the target filename contains spaces and parentheses.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed pointer from a channel to a specific image asset, supporting asset tracking and retrieval within the design-assets channel.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata record att-f9dbacd4 linking an image asset via image://design-assets/icons/image (16)1 to the design-assets channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment for the design-assets channel so it can be referenced and retrieved as a channel asset.
